description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 25cm Width: 34cm Depth: 8cm Leatherette upper with contrast stitch detailing and a metallic brand badge on the front One main compartment with a zippered pocket Two short handles Zippered pocket on the back Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
